action_mappings_indef.release_change_package: release a change package {} from a session slot {}
action_mappings_indef.bind_change_request_with_required_artifa: bind a change request {} with required artifacts in a session slot {} using a mitigation plan {} and an approver {}

predicate_mappings.session_assigned_engineer: the session {} is assigned to the engineer {}
predicate_mappings.session_engineer_confirmed: the engineer for the session {} is confirmed
predicate_mappings.checklist_verified: the checklist for the session {} is verified
predicate_mappings.runbook_executed: the runbook for the session {} is executed
predicate_mappings.session_has_mitigation: the session {} has a mitigation plan {}
predicate_mappings.session_has_diagnostic: the session {} has a diagnostic check {}
predicate_mappings.session_has_change_package: the session {} has a change package {}
predicate_mappings.session_change_request_ready: the session {} has a change request {} ready
predicate_mappings.change_request_locked: the change request for session {} is locked
predicate_mappings.checklist_finalized: the checklist for session {} is finalized
predicate_mappings.session_preexecution_flag: session preexecution flag is set for {}
predicate_mappings.participant_outgoing_service_binding: {} has a participant outgoing service binding with {}
predicate_mappings.session_service_verified: {} has a session service verified with {}
predicate_mappings.session_participant_transferred: a session participant has been transferred in {}
predicate_mappings.session_test_environment_binding: {} has a test environment binding with {}
predicate_mappings.session_change_package_binding: {} has a change package binding with {}
predicate_mappings.session_stakeholder_required: {} requires a stakeholder with the role {}
predicate_mappings.session_service_execution_token: {} has a service execution token for {}
predicate_mappings.incoming_slot_present: there is an incoming slot present in {}
predicate_mappings.outgoing_slot_present: there is an outgoing slot present in {}
predicate_mappings.session_checklist_bound_item: {} is a bound item in the session checklist for {}

initialize_handoff_session.description: initialize handoff session for a session slot A
preconditions: I can only initialize handoff session for a session slot A if it is not the case that the session A is initialized and it is not the case that session A is finalized
effects: Once I initialize handoff session for a session slot A, it is the case that the session A is initialized

assign_engineer_to_session.description: assign an oncall engineer B to a session slot A
preconditions: I can only assign an oncall engineer B to a session slot A if it is the case that the session A is initialized and B is an available engineer and B is eligible for the session A
I can only assign an oncall engineer B to a session slot A if it is not the case that the engineer for the session A is confirmed
effects: Once I assign an oncall engineer B to a session slot A, it is the case that the session A is assigned to the engineer B and the engineer for the session A is confirmed
Once I assign an oncall engineer B to a session slot A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available engineer

release_engineer_from_session.description: release an oncall engineer B from a session slot A
preconditions: I can only release an oncall engineer B from a session slot A if it is the case that the session A is assigned to the engineer B
I can only release an oncall engineer B from a session slot A if it is not the case that the change request for session A is locked and it is not the case that authorization for session A is granted
effects: Once I release an oncall engineer B from a session slot A, it is the case that B is an available engineer

Once I release an oncall engineer B from a session slot A, it is not the case anymore that the session A is assigned to the engineer B and it is not the case anymore that the engineer for the session A is confirmed and it is not the case anymore that the checklist for the session A is verified and it is not the case anymore that the runbook for the session A is executed and it is not the case anymore that session preexecution flag is set for A and it is not the case anymore that session execution is enabled for A and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional validation

bind_checklist_item.description: bind a checklist item B to a session slot A checklist
preconditions: I can only bind a checklist item B to a session slot A checklist if it is the case that the session A is initialized and B is a checklist item available
effects: Once I bind a checklist item B to a session slot A checklist, it is the case that B is a bound item in the session checklist for A
Once I bind a checklist item B to a session slot A checklist, it is not the case anymore that B is a checklist item available

unbind_checklist_item.description: unbind a checklist item B from a session slot A checklist
preconditions: I can only unbind a checklist item B from a session slot A checklist if it is the case that B is a bound item in the session checklist for A
effects: Once I unbind a checklist item B from a session slot A checklist, it is the case that B is a checklist item available
Once I unbind a checklist item B from a session slot A checklist, it is not the case anymore that B is a bound item in the session checklist for A

verify_checklist_item.description: verify a checklist item B for a session slot A
preconditions: I can only verify a checklist item B for a session slot A if it is the case that the session A is initialized and the engineer for the session A is confirmed and B is a bound item in the session checklist for A
I can only verify a checklist item B for a session slot A if it is not the case that the checklist for the session A is verified
effects: Once I verify a checklist item B for a session slot A, it is the case that the checklist for the session A is verified

record_external_ack_and_verify.description: record an external ack B and verify for a session slot A
preconditions: I can only record an external ack B and verify for a session slot A if it is the case that the session A is initialized and the engineer for the session A is confirmed and B is an external acknowledgment available
I can only record an external ack B and verify for a session slot A if it is not the case that the checklist for the session A is verified
effects: Once I record an external ack B and verify for a session slot A, it is the case that the checklist for the session A is verified and session preexecution flag is set for A
Once I record an external ack B and verify for a session slot A, it is not the case anymore that B is an external acknowledgment available

attach_runbook_and_mark.description: attach a runbook C to a checklist item B and mark for a session slot A
preconditions: I can only attach a runbook C to a checklist item B and mark for a session slot A if it is the case that the checklist for the session A is verified and the engineer for the session A is confirmed and B is a bound item in the session checklist for A and C is available
I can only attach a runbook C to a checklist item B and mark for a session slot A if it is not the case that the runbook for the session A is executed
effects: Once I attach a runbook C to a checklist item B and mark for a session slot A, it is the case that the runbook for the session A is executed
Once I attach a runbook C to a checklist item B and mark for a session slot A, it is not the case anymore that session preexecution flag is set for A

mark_runbook_for_service.description: mark runbook for a service B in a session slot A
preconditions: I can only mark runbook for a service B in a session slot A if it is the case that the engineer for the session A is confirmed and A has a session service verified with B
I can only mark runbook for a service B in a session slot A if it is not the case that the runbook for the session A is executed
effects: Once I mark runbook for a service B in a session slot A, it is the case that the runbook for the session A is executed
Once I mark runbook for a service B in a session slot A, it is not the case anymore that session preexecution flag is set for A

reserve_mitigation_plan.description: reserve a mitigation plan B for a session slot A
preconditions: I can only reserve a mitigation plan B for a session slot A if it is the case that the session A is initialized and B is an available mitigation plan and B is assigned to the session A
effects: Once I reserve a mitigation plan B for a session slot A, it is the case that the session A has a mitigation plan B
Once I reserve a mitigation plan B for a session slot A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available mitigation plan

release_mitigation_plan.description: release a mitigation plan B from a session slot A
preconditions: I can only release a mitigation plan B from a session slot A if it is the case that the session A has a mitigation plan B
effects: Once I release a mitigation plan B from a session slot A, it is the case that B is an available mitigation plan
Once I release a mitigation plan B from a session slot A, it is not the case anymore that the session A has a mitigation plan B

reserve_approver.description: reserve an approver B for a session slot A
preconditions: I can only reserve an approver B for a session slot A if it is the case that the session A is initialized and B is an available approver and A has an approver binding with B
effects: Once I reserve an approver B for a session slot A, it is the case that the session A has an approver B
Once I reserve an approver B for a session slot A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available approver

release_approver.description: release an approver B from a session slot A
preconditions: I can only release an approver B from a session slot A if it is the case that the session A has an approver B
effects: Once I release an approver B from a session slot A, it is the case that B is an available approver
Once I release an approver B from a session slot A, it is not the case anymore that the session A has an approver B

reserve_diagnostic_check.description: reserve a diagnostic check B for a session slot A
preconditions: I can only reserve a diagnostic check B for a session slot A if it is the case that the session A is initialized and B is a diagnostic available and A has a diagnostic binding with B
effects: Once I reserve a diagnostic check B for a session slot A, it is the case that the session A has a diagnostic check B
Once I reserve a diagnostic check B for a session slot A, it is not the case anymore that B is a diagnostic available

release_diagnostic_check.description: release a diagnostic check B from a session slot A
preconditions: I can only release a diagnostic check B from a session slot A if it is the case that the session A has a diagnostic check B
effects: Once I release a diagnostic check B from a session slot A, it is the case that B is a diagnostic available
Once I release a diagnostic check B from a session slot A, it is not the case anymore that the session A has a diagnostic check B

reserve_change_package.description: reserve a change package B for a session slot A
preconditions: I can only reserve a change package B for a session slot A if it is the case that the session A is initialized and B is available and A has a change package binding with B
effects: Once I reserve a change package B for a session slot A, it is the case that the session A has a change package B
Once I reserve a change package B for a session slot A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_change_package.description: release a change package B from a session slot A
preconditions: I can only release a change package B from a session slot A if it is the case that the session A has a change package B
effects: Once I release a change package B from a session slot A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a change package B from a session slot A, it is not the case anymore that the session A has a change package B

bind_change_request_with_required_artifa.description: bind a change request B with required artifacts in a session slot A using a mitigation plan C and an approver D
preconditions: I can only bind a change request B with required artifacts in a session slot A using a mitigation plan C and an approver D if it is the case that the engineer for the session A is confirmed and the session A has a mitigation plan C and the session A has an approver D and B is a valid change request and B is linked to the session A
I can only bind a change request B with required artifacts in a session slot A using a mitigation plan C and an approver D if it is not the case that the change request for session A is locked
effects: Once I bind a change request B with required artifacts in a session slot A using a mitigation plan C and an approver D, it is the case that the session A has a change request B ready and the change request for session A is locked
Once I bind a change request B with required artifacts in a session slot A using a mitigation plan C and an approver D, it is not the case anymore that B is a valid change request

bind_change_request_with_diagnostic_and_.description: bind a change request B with diagnostic and test environment in a session slot A using a diagnostic check C and a test environment D
preconditions: I can only bind a change request B with diagnostic and test environment in a session slot A using a diagnostic check C and a test environment D if it is the case that the engineer for the session A is confirmed and the session A has a diagnostic check C and D is available and B is a valid change request and B is linked to the session A and A has a test environment binding with D

I can only bind a change request B with diagnostic and test environment in a session slot A using a diagnostic check C and a test environment D if it is not the case that the change request for session A is locked
effects: Once I bind a change request B with diagnostic and test environment in a session slot A using a diagnostic check C and a test environment D, it is the case that the session A has a change request B ready and the change request for session A is locked and A requires additional validation and session preexecution flag is set for A

Once I bind a change request B with diagnostic and test environment in a session slot A using a diagnostic check C and a test environment D, it is not the case anymore that B is a valid change request and it is not the case anymore that D is available

consume_approvals_before_execution.description: consume approvals for a session slot A using a mitigation plan B and an approver C before execution
preconditions: I can only consume approvals for a session slot A using a mitigation plan B and an approver C before execution if it is the case that the change request for session A is locked and A requires additional validation and the session A has a mitigation plan B and the session A has an approver C
effects: Once I consume approvals for a session slot A using a mitigation plan B and an approver C before execution, it is not the case anymore that A requires additional validation and it is not the case anymore that session preexecution flag is set for A

record_multi_party_authorization.description: record multi party authorization for a session slot A with a mitigation plan B, an approver C, and a primary stakeholder D
preconditions: I can only record multi party authorization for a session slot A with a mitigation plan B, an approver C, and a primary stakeholder D if it is the case that the runbook for the session A is executed and the change request for session A is locked and the session A has a mitigation plan B and the session A has an approver C and A requires a stakeholder with the role D

I can only record multi party authorization for a session slot A with a mitigation plan B, an approver C, and a primary stakeholder D if it is not the case that session preexecution flag is set for A and it is not the case that authorization for session A is granted
effects: Once I record multi party authorization for a session slot A with a mitigation plan B, an approver C, and a primary stakeholder D, it is the case that authorization for session A is granted

record_multi_party_authorization_with_se.description: record multi party authorization with secondary for a session slot A including a diagnostic check B, a change package C, and a secondary stakeholder D
preconditions: I can only record multi party authorization with secondary for a session slot A including a diagnostic check B, a change package C, and a secondary stakeholder D if it is the case that the runbook for the session A is executed and the change request for session A is locked and the session A has a diagnostic check B and the session A has a change package C and A requires a stakeholder with the role D

I can only record multi party authorization with secondary for a session slot A including a diagnostic check B, a change package C, and a secondary stakeholder D if it is not the case that authorization for session A is granted
effects: Once I record multi party authorization with secondary for a session slot A including a diagnostic check B, a change package C, and a secondary stakeholder D, it is the case that authorization for session A is granted and session preexecution flag is set for A

finalize_authorization_and_prepare_execu.description: finalize authorization and prepare execution for a session slot A with a mitigation plan B and an approver C
preconditions: I can only finalize authorization and prepare execution for a session slot A with a mitigation plan B and an approver C if it is the case that authorization for session A is granted and session preexecution flag is set for A and the session A has a mitigation plan B and the session A has an approver C
effects: Once I finalize authorization and prepare execution for a session slot A with a mitigation plan B and an approver C, it is the case that session execution is enabled for A

Once I finalize authorization and prepare execution for a session slot A with a mitigation plan B and an approver C, it is not the case anymore that session preexecution flag is set for A and it is not the case anymore that the runbook for the session A is executed and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional validation

perform_checklist_step_with_runbook.description: perform checklist step with a runbook C for a session slot A and a checklist item B
preconditions: I can only perform checklist step with a runbook C for a session slot A and a checklist item B if it is the case that session execution is enabled for A and authorization for session A is granted and the engineer for the session A is confirmed and B is a bound item in the session checklist for A and C is available
I can only perform checklist step with a runbook C for a session slot A and a checklist item B if it is not the case that the runbook for the session A is executed
effects: Once I perform checklist step with a runbook C for a session slot A and a checklist item B, it is the case that the runbook for the session A is executed

finalize_checklist_item.description: finalize a checklist item B for a session slot A
preconditions: I can only finalize a checklist item B for a session slot A if it is the case that authorization for session A is granted and the runbook for the session A is executed and B is a bound item in the session checklist for A
I can only finalize a checklist item B for a session slot A if it is not the case that session preexecution flag is set for A and it is not the case that the checklist for session A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize a checklist item B for a session slot A, it is the case that the checklist for session A is finalized

finalize_with_external_ack.description: finalize a session slot A with an external ack B
preconditions: I can only finalize a session slot A with an external ack B if it is the case that authorization for session A is granted and the runbook for the session A is executed and B is an external acknowledgment available
I can only finalize a session slot A with an external ack B if it is not the case that session preexecution flag is set for A and it is not the case that the checklist for session A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize a session slot A with an external ack B, it is the case that the checklist for session A is finalized
Once I finalize a session slot A with an external ack B, it is not the case anymore that B is an external acknowledgment available

bind_service_execution_token.description: bind service execution token for a session slot A to a service B
preconditions: I can only bind service execution token for a session slot A to a service B if it is the case that the checklist for session A is finalized and B has an execution token available and A binds to the participant service B
effects: Once I bind service execution token for a session slot A to a service B, it is the case that A has a service execution token for B
Once I bind service execution token for a session slot A to a service B, it is not the case anymore that B has an execution token available

record_participant_transfer_confirmation.description: record participant transfer confirmation from an outgoing session A to an incoming session B for a service C
preconditions: I can only record participant transfer confirmation from an outgoing session A to an incoming session B for a service C if it is the case that the session A is initialized and there is an outgoing slot present in A and A has a participant outgoing service binding with C and B has a service execution token for C
I can only record participant transfer confirmation from an outgoing session A to an incoming session B for a service C if it is not the case that A has a session service verified with C
effects: Once I record participant transfer confirmation from an outgoing session A to an incoming session B for a service C, it is the case that A has a session service verified with C

record_post_transfer_check_completion.description: record post transfer check completion for a session slot A with a checklist item B using a runbook C
preconditions: I can only record post transfer check completion for a session slot A with a checklist item B using a runbook C if it is the case that the session A is initialized and there is an outgoing slot present in A and the runbook for the session A is executed and the checklist for session A is finalized and B is a bound item in the session checklist for A and C is available
I can only record post transfer check completion for a session slot A with a checklist item B using a runbook C if it is not the case that a session participant has been transferred in A
effects: Once I record post transfer check completion for a session slot A with a checklist item B using a runbook C, it is the case that a session participant has been transferred in A

set_finalization_flag.description: set finalization flag for a session slot A
preconditions: I can only set finalization flag for a session slot A if it is the case that there is an incoming slot present in A and the session A is initialized and the engineer for the session A is confirmed and the change request for session A is locked and authorization for session A is granted and the checklist for session A is finalized and the runbook for the session A is executed
I can only set finalization flag for a session slot A if it is not the case that session A is finalized
effects: Once I set finalization flag for a session slot A, it is the case that session A is finalized

set_finalization_flag_with_service_verif.description: set finalization flag for a session slot A with service verification of a service B
preconditions: I can only set finalization flag for a session slot A with service verification of a service B if it is the case that there is an outgoing slot present in A and the session A is initialized and the engineer for the session A is confirmed and the change request for session A is locked and authorization for session A is granted and the checklist for session A is finalized and the runbook for the session A is executed and A has a session service verified with B
I can only set finalization flag for a session slot A with service verification of a service B if it is not the case that session A is finalized
effects: Once I set finalization flag for a session slot A with service verification of a service B, it is the case that session A is finalized

set_finalization_flag_with_transfer.description: set finalization flag for a session slot A with transfer completion
preconditions: I can only set finalization flag for a session slot A with transfer completion if it is the case that there is an outgoing slot present in A and the session A is initialized and the engineer for the session A is confirmed and the change request for session A is locked and authorization for session A is granted and the checklist for session A is finalized and the runbook for the session A is executed and a session participant has been transferred in A
I can only set finalization flag for a session slot A with transfer completion if it is not the case that session A is finalized
effects: Once I set finalization flag for a session slot A with transfer completion, it is the case that session A is finalized

action_nl_templates.initialize_handoff_session: initialize handoff session for session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates.assign_engineer_to_session: assign oncall engineer {?oncall_engineer} to session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates.release_engineer_from_session: release oncall engineer {?oncall_engineer} from session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates.bind_checklist_item: bind checklist item {?checklist_item} to session slot {?handoff_session} checklist
action_nl_templates.unbind_checklist_item: unbind checklist item {?checklist_item} from session slot {?handoff_session} checklist
action_nl_templates.verify_checklist_item: verify checklist item {?checklist_item} for session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates.record_external_ack_and_verify: record external ack {?external_ack} and verify for session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates.attach_runbook_and_mark: attach runbook {?runbook} to checklist item {?checklist_item} and mark for session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates.mark_runbook_for_service: mark runbook for service {?service} in session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates.reserve_mitigation_plan: reserve mitigation plan {?mitigation_plan} for session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates.release_mitigation_plan: release mitigation plan {?mitigation_plan} from session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates.reserve_diagnostic_check: reserve diagnostic check {?diagnostic_check} for session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates.release_diagnostic_check: release diagnostic check {?diagnostic_check} from session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates.reserve_change_package: reserve change package {?change_package} for session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates.release_change_package: release change package {?change_package} from session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates.bind_change_request_with_required_artifa: bind change request {?change_request} with required artifacts in session slot {?handoff_session} using mitigation plan {?mitigation_plan} and approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates.bind_change_request_with_diagnostic_and_: bind change request {?change_request} with diagnostic and test environment in session slot {?handoff_session} using diagnostic check {?diagnostic_check} and test environment {?test_environment}
action_nl_templates.consume_approvals_before_execution: consume approvals for session slot {?handoff_session} using mitigation plan {?mitigation_plan} and approver {?approver} before execution
action_nl_templates.record_multi_party_authorization: record multi-party authorization for session slot {?handoff_session} with mitigation plan {?mitigation_plan}, approver {?approver}, and primary stakeholder {?primary_stakeholder}
action_nl_templates.record_multi_party_authorization_with_se: record multi-party authorization with secondary for session slot {?handoff_session} including diagnostic check {?diagnostic_check}, change package {?change_package}, and secondary stakeholder {?secondary_stakeholder}
action_nl_templates.finalize_authorization_and_prepare_execu: finalize authorization and prepare execution for session slot {?handoff_session} with mitigation plan {?mitigation_plan} and approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates.perform_checklist_step_with_runbook: perform checklist step with runbook {?runbook} for session slot {?handoff_session} and checklist item {?checklist_item}
action_nl_templates.finalize_checklist_item: finalize checklist item {?checklist_item} for session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates.finalize_with_external_ack: finalize session slot {?handoff_session} with external ack {?external_ack}
action_nl_templates.bind_service_execution_token: bind service execution token for session slot {?handoff_session} to service {?service}
action_nl_templates.record_participant_transfer_confirmation: record participant transfer confirmation from outgoing session {?outgoing_participant} to incoming session {?incoming_participant} for service {?service}
action_nl_templates.record_post_transfer_check_completion: record post-transfer check completion for session slot {?handoff_session} with checklist item {?checklist_item} using runbook {?runbook}
action_nl_templates.set_finalization_flag: set finalization flag for session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates.set_finalization_flag_with_service_verif: set finalization flag for session slot {?handoff_session} with service verification of service {?service}
action_nl_templates.set_finalization_flag_with_transfer: set finalization flag for session slot {?handoff_session} with transfer completion

predicate_nl_templates.session_assigned_engineer: the session {?handoff_session} is assigned to the engineer {?oncall_engineer}
predicate_nl_templates.session_engineer_confirmed: the engineer for the session {?handoff_session} is confirmed
predicate_nl_templates.checklist_verified: the checklist for the session {?handoff_session} is verified
predicate_nl_templates.runbook_executed: the runbook for the session {?handoff_session} is executed
predicate_nl_templates.session_has_mitigation: the session {?handoff_session} has a mitigation plan {?mitigation_plan}
predicate_nl_templates.session_has_diagnostic: the session {?handoff_session} has a diagnostic check {?diagnostic_check}
predicate_nl_templates.session_has_change_package: the session {?handoff_session} has a change package {?change_package}
predicate_nl_templates.session_change_request_ready: the session {?handoff_session} has a change request {?change_request} ready
predicate_nl_templates.change_request_locked: the change request for session {?handoff_session} is locked
predicate_nl_templates.checklist_finalized: the checklist for session {?handoff_session} is finalized
predicate_nl_templates.session_preexecution_flag: session preexecution flag is set for {?handoff_session}
predicate_nl_templates.participant_outgoing_service_binding: {?handoff_session} has a participant outgoing service binding with {?service}
predicate_nl_templates.session_service_verified: {?handoff_session} has a session service verified with {?service}
predicate_nl_templates.session_participant_transferred: a session participant has been transferred in {?handoff_session}
predicate_nl_templates.session_test_environment_binding: {?handoff_session} has a test environment binding with {?test_environment}
predicate_nl_templates.session_change_package_binding: {?handoff_session} has a change package binding with {?change_package}
predicate_nl_templates.session_stakeholder_required: {?handoff_session} requires a stakeholder with the role {?stakeholder_role}
predicate_nl_templates.session_service_execution_token: {?handoff_session} has a service execution token for {?service}
predicate_nl_templates.incoming_slot_present: there is an incoming slot present in {?handoff_session}
predicate_nl_templates.outgoing_slot_present: there is an outgoing slot present in {?handoff_session}
predicate_nl_templates.session_checklist_bound_item: {?checklist_item} is a bound item in the session checklist for {?handoff_session}

action_nl_templates_indef.initialize_handoff_session: initialize handoff session for a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_engineer_to_session: assign an oncall engineer {?oncall_engineer} to a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_engineer_from_session: release an oncall engineer {?oncall_engineer} from a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_checklist_item: bind a checklist item {?checklist_item} to a session slot {?handoff_session} checklist
action_nl_templates_indef.unbind_checklist_item: unbind a checklist item {?checklist_item} from a session slot {?handoff_session} checklist
action_nl_templates_indef.verify_checklist_item: verify a checklist item {?checklist_item} for a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_external_ack_and_verify: record an external ack {?external_ack} and verify for a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_runbook_and_mark: attach a runbook {?runbook} to a checklist item {?checklist_item} and mark for a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_runbook_for_service: mark runbook for a service {?service} in a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_mitigation_plan: reserve a mitigation plan {?mitigation_plan} for a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_mitigation_plan: release a mitigation plan {?mitigation_plan} from a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_approver: reserve an approver {?approver} for a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_approver: release an approver {?approver} from a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_diagnostic_check: reserve a diagnostic check {?diagnostic_check} for a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_diagnostic_check: release a diagnostic check {?diagnostic_check} from a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_change_package: reserve a change package {?change_package} for a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_change_package: release a change package {?change_package} from a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_change_request_with_required_artifa: bind a change request {?change_request} with required artifacts in a session slot {?handoff_session} using a mitigation plan {?mitigation_plan} and an approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_change_request_with_diagnostic_and_: bind a change request {?change_request} with diagnostic and test environment in a session slot {?handoff_session} using a diagnostic check {?diagnostic_check} and a test environment {?test_environment}
action_nl_templates_indef.consume_approvals_before_execution: consume approvals for a session slot {?handoff_session} using a mitigation plan {?mitigation_plan} and an approver {?approver} before execution
action_nl_templates_indef.record_multi_party_authorization: record multi-party authorization for a session slot {?handoff_session} with a mitigation plan {?mitigation_plan}, an approver {?approver}, and a primary stakeholder {?primary_stakeholder}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_multi_party_authorization_with_se: record multi-party authorization with secondary for a session slot {?handoff_session} including a diagnostic check {?diagnostic_check}, a change package {?change_package}, and a secondary stakeholder {?secondary_stakeholder}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_authorization_and_prepare_execu: finalize authorization and prepare execution for a session slot {?handoff_session} with a mitigation plan {?mitigation_plan} and an approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.perform_checklist_step_with_runbook: perform checklist step with a runbook {?runbook} for a session slot {?handoff_session} and a checklist item {?checklist_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_checklist_item: finalize a checklist item {?checklist_item} for a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_with_external_ack: finalize a session slot {?handoff_session} with an external ack {?external_ack}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_service_execution_token: bind service execution token for a session slot {?handoff_session} to a service {?service}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_participant_transfer_confirmation: record participant transfer confirmation from an outgoing session {?outgoing_participant} to an incoming session {?incoming_participant} for a service {?service}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_post_transfer_check_completion: record post-transfer check completion for a session slot {?handoff_session} with a checklist item {?checklist_item} using a runbook {?runbook}
action_nl_templates_indef.set_finalization_flag: set finalization flag for a session slot {?handoff_session}
action_nl_templates_indef.set_finalization_flag_with_service_verif: set finalization flag for a session slot {?handoff_session} with service verification of a service {?service}
action_nl_templates_indef.set_finalization_flag_with_transfer: set finalization flag for a session slot {?handoff_session} with transfer completion

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a session slot or a oncall engineer or a change request or a approver or a mitigation plan or a diagnostic check or a checklist item or a external ack or a service or a runbook or a test environment or a change package or a stakeholder role is also a object
Everything that is a primary stakeholder or a secondary stakeholder is also a stakeholder role
Everything that is a incoming session or a outgoing session is also a session slot
